defaultLocale.name: Awesome Screenshot: Screen capture, Annotate
defaultLocale.description: Screen capture for all or part of any web page. Add annotations, comments, blur sensitive info, and share with one-click uploads.

locales.name: Awesome Screenshot: Screen capture, Annotate
locales.description: Screen capture for all or part of any web page. Add annotations, comments, blur sensitive info, and share with one-click uploads.

locales.name: Awesome Screenshot: キャプチャーと注釈
locales.description: スクリーンキャプチャフルページのスクリーンショット。スクリーンキャスト用のスクリーンレコーダー。注釈を付けてトレロ/スラックなどに共有する

locales.name: Awesome Screenshot: Screen Video Recorder
locales.description: Capture d'écran pleine page capture d'écran. Recoder d’écran pour screencast. Annoter et partager sur trello / slack etc.

locales.name: Awesome Screenshot: Videoregistratore Schermo
locales.description: Schermata Acquisisci pagina intera. Schermo recoder per screencast. Annota e condividi su trello / slack ecc.

locales.name: 网页截图:注释&录屏
locales.description: 录屏，捕获整个页面或任何部分，矩形，圆形，箭头，线条和文字，模糊敏感信息，一键上传分享注释。支持PNG和链接

locales.name: Awesome Screenshot: Grabadora de video de pantalla
locales.description: Captura de pantalla captura de pantalla de página completa. Grabador de pantalla para screencast. Anotar y compartir en trello / slack, etc.

locales.name: 1Password – パスワード保管庫
locales.description: ウェブブラウザで1Passwordを使うための最良の方法。サイトに簡単にサインインし、パスワードを生成し、情報を安全に保存できます。
locales.creator: AgileBits

locales.name: 1Password – Gestionnaire de mots de passe
locales.description: La meilleure façon d'utiliser 1Password. Connectez-vous à des sites Web, créez des mots de passe et stockez des données sécurisées.
locales.creator: AgileBits

locales.name: 1Password – 비밀번호 관리 프로그램
locales.description: 브라우저에서 1Password를 경험할 수 있는 최고의 방법. 간편하게 사이트들에 로그인하고 비밀번호를 생성하며 중요한 정보를 보관하세요.
locales.creator: AgileBits

locales.name: 1Password – Gestore di password
locales.description: Il modo migliore per usare 1Password nel browser. Accedi facilmente ai siti, genera password e archivia informazioni in modo sicuro.
locales.creator: AgileBits

locales.name: 1Password – Passwort-Manager
locales.description: Der beste Weg, 1Password im Browser zu erleben. Einfach bei Websites anmelden, Passwörter erstellen und sichere Daten speichern.
locales.creator: AgileBits

locales.name: 1Password - 密码管理器
locales.description: 在浏览器中体验 1Password 的最佳方式。轻松登录网站、生成密码和保存安全信息。
locales.creator: AgileBits

locales.name: 1Password — Менеджер паролей
locales.description: Лучший способ использовать 1Password в браузере. С лёгкостью входите на сайты, создавайте пароли и храните защищённую информацию.
locales.creator: AgileBits

locales.name: 1Password – Gerenciador de senhas
locales.description: A melhor maneira de experimentar o 1Password no seu navegador. Faça login em sites facilmente, gere senhas e armazene informações.
locales.creator: AgileBits

locales.name: 1Password – Gestor de contraseñas
locales.description: La mejor forma de usar 1Password en tu navegador. Inicia sesión en sitios web, genera contraseñas y almacena información fácilmente.
locales.creator: AgileBits

locales.name: 1Password - 密碼管理器
locales.description: 在瀏覽器中體驗 1Password 的最佳方式。輕鬆登入網站、產生密碼和儲存安全資訊。
locales.creator: AgileBits

locales.name: 1Password - Wachtwoordbeheerder
locales.description: Je ervaart 1Password het beste in je browser. Log eenvoudig in op sites, genereer wachtwoorden en sla beveiligde informatie op.
locales.creator: AgileBits
